english translation text: To seek fulfilment of legitimate desires and remove difficulties, pray a 2 rakaat salaat of ‘hadiya to Abul Fadhl Abbas(a.s)’Then recite salawat 11 times before and after the following dua:

arabic text: الّلهمَّ صلِّ على مُحمَّدٍ و آلِ مُحمَّدٍ
english translation text:
O Allah! Send Your Blessings on Muhammad (s.a.w) and the family of Muhammad
X  11

arabic text: يَا كَاشِفَ الْكَرْبِ عَنْ وَجْهِ الْحُسَيْنِ عَليْهِ السَّلَامُاِكْشِفْ كَرْبِيْ بِحَقِّ أخِيْكَ الْحُسَيْنِ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ
english translation text:
O He who removes hardships on account of the honour of Hussain (a.s)
drive away my hardship for the sake of your brother Hussain )a.s(
X  133

arabic text: الّلهمَّ صلِّ على مُحمَّدٍ و آلِ مُحمَّدٍ
english translation text:
O Allah! Send Your Blessings on Muhammad (s.a.w) and the family of Muhammad
X  11
